title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MABINI, PROVINCE OF DAVAO, TO BE KNOWN AS THE MABINI HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 33924 / 88 OG No. 28, 4491 (July 13, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7504, May 18, 1992 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MABINI, PROVINCE OF DAVAO, TO BE KNOWN AS THE MABINI HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established a high school in the Municipality of Mabini, Province of Davao, to be known as the Mabini High School.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of Education, Culture and Sports shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 3. The amount necessary for the implementation of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on February 7, 1992 and January 27, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: May 18, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
